_meta.description: Ideal for restaurants, takeaways, cafés, food trucks, and catering. Includes menu browsing, order/table booking, hours, delivery info, and AI fallback.
_meta.chatgpt_prompt:
You are helping me set up a WhatsApp chatbot for my food business using the Appleberry Messaging OS platform.

I will give you this JSON template. Your job is to:
1. Replace every value marked [LIKE_THIS] with real information about my business
2. Adjust captions and menu options to match my food offerings
3. NEVER change these technical fields: type_search, save_data, get_api_data, run, status, type, presenceType, send_to, inputname, api_url, api_config
4. Keep all nextBot chain values intact
5. Return ONLY the complete modified JSON — no explanation

FIELD GUIDE:
- keywords: words the customer types to trigger this step
- caption: the message the bot sends ([wa_name] = customer's name)
- type_search: '1' = contains match, '2' = exact match — do not change
- nextBot: auto-triggers next step
- presenceTime: delay in seconds
- use_ai: '1' = AI generates reply
- is_default: '1' = catches all unmatched messages (only one allowed)

MY BUSINESS INFO:
Restaurant Name: [YOUR_RESTAURANT_NAME]
Cuisine Type: [e.g. Italian / Sushi / Braai / Fast Food]
Location: [FULL_ADDRESS]
Hours: [e.g. Mon-Sun 11am-10pm]
Phone/WhatsApp: [+XX_XXX_XXX_XXXX]
Website / Online menu: [https://yourdomain.com]

Menu Category 1: [CATEGORY_NAME] — [popular items and price range]
Menu Category 2: [CATEGORY_NAME] — [popular items and price range]
Menu Category 3: [CATEGORY_NAME] — [popular items and price range]

Do you offer delivery? [YES/NO — if yes, delivery area and fee]
Do you accept reservations? [YES/NO — if yes, how to book]
Specials / promotions: [ANY_CURRENT_DEAL]

chatbots.name: Start Message
chatbots.caption:
👋 Hello, [wa_name]! Welcome to [YOUR_RESTAURANT_NAME] 🍽️

We're glad you're here! Type MENU to see what we can help you with today.

chatbots.name: Menu Title
chatbots.caption: *🌟 [YOUR_RESTAURANT_NAME] — How can we help?*
chatbots.description: Menu header — chains to options list

chatbots.name: Navigation Menu
chatbots.caption:
1) View our Menu / Today's Specials
2) Place a Takeaway Order
3) Book a Table
4) Delivery Info
5) Location & Hours
6) Speak to a Human — type HUMAN
chatbots.description: Numbered options — customize labels to match your offerings

chatbots.name: View Menu
chatbots.caption:
🍽 [YOUR_RESTAURANT_NAME] — Today's Menu

[CATEGORY_1]:
• [ITEM_1] — [PRICE]
• [ITEM_2] — [PRICE]

[CATEGORY_2]:
• [ITEM_1] — [PRICE]
• [ITEM_2] — [PRICE]

[SPECIALS_OR_DEALS_IF_ANY]

Full menu: [WEBSITE_OR_MENU_LINK]

Type MENU to return.
chatbots.description: Menu / specials page — you can also add a media image URL for a menu photo

chatbots.name: Takeaway Order
chatbots.caption:
🥡 Takeaway Order

Please send us:
1) Your name
2) What you'd like to order (items + quantities)
3) Preferred collection time

We'll confirm availability and total. Reply SUBMIT when ready.

chatbots.name: Table Booking
chatbots.caption:
🍷 Table Reservation

Please send:
1) Your name
2) Date and time
3) Number of guests
4) Any special requests?

Reply SUBMIT when done. We'll confirm shortly.

chatbots.name: Order Confirmed
chatbots.caption:
✅ Got it! We've received your request and will confirm shortly.

For urgent help, type HUMAN. Type MENU to return.

chatbots.name: Delivery Info
chatbots.caption:
🚗 Delivery Info

[DELIVERY_AVAILABLE_YES_OR_NO — if yes, describe:]
Delivery area: [AREAS_WE_DELIVER_TO]
Delivery fee: [PRICE or FREE_OVER_X]
Estimated time: [e.g. 30-45 minutes]

To place a delivery order, type HUMAN and our team will assist you.

Type MENU to return.
chatbots.description: Delivery info — update or remove if no delivery

chatbots.name: Location & Hours
chatbots.caption:
📍 [YOUR_RESTAURANT_NAME]

Address: [FULL_ADDRESS]
Hours: [YOUR_HOURS]
Phone: [YOUR_PHONE]
Website: [YOUR_WEBSITE]

Type MENU to return.

chatbots.name: Human Handoff
chatbots.caption:
👨‍💻 Connecting you to our team now.
We'll respond as soon as possible during business hours ([YOUR_HOURS]).

Type MENU to return to the bot.

chatbots.name: Opt-Out
chatbots.caption:
✅ You've been unsubscribed from [YOUR_RESTAURANT_NAME] broadcast messages.

(Reply START anytime to opt back in.)

chatbots.name: AI Fallback
chatbots.caption:
You are the AI assistant for [YOUR_RESTAURANT_NAME], a [CUISINE_TYPE] restaurant.

RULES:
- Only answer questions about this restaurant
- All prices in [YOUR_CURRENCY]
- Keep replies under 300 characters
- Include one emoji
- End with a CTA (e.g. visit us / book a table / order now)
- If you can't answer, say: 'I don't have that info — type HUMAN to speak to our team or MENU for options.'

BUSINESS INFO:
Name: [YOUR_RESTAURANT_NAME]
Cuisine: [CUISINE_TYPE]
Address: [FULL_ADDRESS]
Hours: [YOUR_HOURS]
Phone: [YOUR_PHONE]
Website: [YOUR_WEBSITE]

Popular dishes:
- [DISH_1]: [PRICE]
- [DISH_2]: [PRICE]
- [DISH_3]: [PRICE]

Delivery: [YES/NO — details]
Reservations: [YES/NO — how to book]
chatbots.description: AI fallback — catches all unmatched messages. Requires AI provider in Settings > AI Providers.
